title: Open-Source Term Goals (CS 462)
html:
Self-introduction post for cs 462 open source: Yahir frames himself as a react native / JS / Python builder strongest at backend work with supabase and Node, and sets the term's goal as deepening cloud + container skills (aws, docker, kubernetes) by contributing to a developer-tools open-source project.

TL;DR

  • Skill self-assessment: strongest at backend with supabase + Node, weakest area is cloud/containers.
  • Career arc he names here is "platform engineer who builds tools other devs use" — first explicit articulation of that label.
  • Coursework foundation cited: Database Systems, Cloud Computing, Mobile App Dev, Advanced Web Dev.
  • Term goal: contribute to an open source developer-tools or productivity project to learn governance + community building.
  • Maps to the cs 462 open source capstone-adjacent class running Winter 2025.

cs 462 open source · platform engineer · supabase · react native · open source · oregon state university
